question: A lab orders 3 safety kits at 12 dollars each and pays a separate handling fee of 5 dollars. What is the total cost?
A clinic buys 4 filters at 9 dollars each and must add an installation fee of 7 dollars. What is the final bill?
A field team rents 6 radios at 11 dollars each and pays a fixed service fee of 14 dollars. What is the total?
A 100 dollar monitor is discounted by 20 percent, then 10 percent tax is applied to the discounted subtotal. What is the final price?
A 200 dollar device gets a 25 percent discount, then a 10 percent tax is applied to the discounted subtotal. What is the total?
A 300 dollar sensor package receives a 30 percent discount, then 5 percent tax is applied to the discounted subtotal. What is the final price?
A robot uses 4 cables, each 150 centimeters long. What is the total length in meters?
A lab cuts 3 strips, each 250 millimeters long. What is their total length in centimeters?
A device logs 5 samples, each lasting 120 seconds. What is the total duration in minutes?
Three trial scores are 70, 80, and 90. A late fourth trial scored 100. What is the average across all trials?
A sensor reports readings 8, 10, and 12. A delayed reading of 14 must also be included. What is the average?
A team records task times of 20, 25, 30, and then adds one missing task time of 35. What is the average time?
